# Ruzaani

> Ruzaani is an AI business intelligence platform that unifies lead qualification, sales automation, and customer lifecycle management through a swarm of six specialized AI agents. It connects online behavior, ad attribution, conversations, and CRM data into a single Golden Record for each contact. Built for AI automation agencies, marketing agencies, and B2B enterprises.

## Platform

- [Product Overview](https://ruzaani.com/product/): How Ruzaani's six-agent swarm (SDR, Closer, Sentinel, Analyst, Strategist, Curator) operates on shared contextual memory to automate the full sales pipeline.
- [Pricing & Plans](https://ruzaani.com/pricing/): Four tiers — Starter ($199/mo), Basic ($349/mo), Growth ($599/mo), Enterprise ($1,299/mo) — with multi-currency support (USD, EUR, MXN, KRW).
- [Agency Program](https://ruzaani.com/agency-program/): Multi-tenant infrastructure for AI automation agencies to build, resell, and manage AI-ops at scale. Includes white-label reporting, SDR automation, and command center dashboards.

## How It Works

- [Intelligent Lead Qualification](https://ruzaani.com/access/): Interactive 5-question assessment that scores inbound leads across business vertical, communication channel, daily volume, and handling method. Leads are classified as SQL (score >= 65), MQL (>= 40), or NQ (< 40).
- [Enterprise Inquiries](https://ruzaani.com/pricing/): Direct contact channel for enterprise prospects requiring custom deployments, dedicated infrastructure, or volume-based pricing.

## Core Capabilities

- **The Swarm**: Six specialized AI agents — SDR (lead qualification), Closer (conversion), Sentinel (security/fraud), Analyst (data intelligence), Strategist (pipeline optimization), Curator (content/recommendations) — operating on shared contextual memory.
- **Identity Resolution**: Stitching anonymous sessions to known contacts across 10+ signals including ad click IDs, form submissions, email engagement, and CRM field matches.
- **Golden Record**: A unified contact profile that merges data from web interactions, conversations, CRM records, and third-party integrations into a single source of truth.
- **Channel Integration**: Native connectors for WhatsApp, Instagram, web forms, phone, and email. Conversations are automatically logged and analyzed.
- **Lead Scoring**: Weighted scoring engine that evaluates business vertical (up to 30 pts), communication channel (up to 20 pts), daily inquiry volume (up to 30 pts), and current handling method (up to 25 pts). Maximum score: 105.
- **Pipeline Automation**: Automated follow-up sequences, appointment scheduling, and deal progression triggered by lead qualification scores and behavioral signals.

## For Agencies

- [Payload: Deploy](https://ruzaani.com/agency-program/): Rapid deployment tools for spinning up client instances with pre-configured agent swarms and channel integrations.
- [Payload: SDR](https://ruzaani.com/agency-program/): Automated SDR workflows — lead capture, qualification, scoring, and handoff — fully managed by the AI swarm.
- [Payload: Command](https://ruzaani.com/agency-program/): Centralized dashboard for monitoring all client accounts, agent performance metrics, and pipeline health.
- [Payload: White Label](https://ruzaani.com/agency-program/): Rebrandable reporting and client-facing dashboards. Agencies present Ruzaani as their own proprietary platform.
- [Scale Engine](https://ruzaani.com/agency-program/): Infrastructure for managing 50+ client accounts with automated onboarding, billing, and resource allocation.

## Security & Privacy

- [Data Protection](https://ruzaani.com/privacy-policy/): All data is encrypted at rest and in transit. Customer data is never used for training public LLM models. GDPR and CCPA compliant.
- [Terms of Service](https://ruzaani.com/terms-of-service/): Enterprise-grade SLA with 99.9% uptime guarantee, dedicated support, and custom data retention policies.

## Languages & Localization

Ruzaani is natively trilingual. All pages, forms, and email notifications are fully localized:

| Language | URL Prefix | Coverage |
|----------|-----------|----------|
| English | `/` | All pages, forms, emails |
| Spanish | `/es/` | All pages, forms, emails |
| Korean | `/ko/` | All pages, forms, emails |

### Localized URLs

- **Home**: `/` · `/es/` · `/ko/`
- **Product**: `/product/` · `/es/producto/` · `/ko/product/`
- **Pricing**: `/pricing/` · `/es/precios/` · `/ko/pricing/`
- **Agency Program**: `/agency-program/` · `/es/agencias/` · `/ko/agency-program/`
- **Access Request**: `/access/` · `/es/acceso/` · `/ko/access/`
- **Thank You**: `/thanks/` · `/es/gracias/` · `/ko/thanks/`
- **Privacy Policy**: `/privacy-policy/` · `/es/politica-de-privacidad/` · `/ko/privacy-policy/`
- **Terms of Service**: `/terms-of-service/` · `/es/terminos-y-condiciones/` · `/ko/terms-of-service/`

## Technical Architecture

- **Backend**: Haskell web application using the Lurk framework (Scotty-based). Server-side rendered HTML with quasi-quoter-based templates.
- **Session Management**: File-backed sessions with CSRF protection (synchronizer token pattern). 24-hour TTL with automatic cleanup.
- **Form Security**: Honeypot fields, time-to-submit validation (minimum 3 seconds), DNS MX record verification on email domains, CSRF token enforcement on all POST endpoints.
- **Email**: SMTP delivery via TLS (port 465) with UTF-8 base64 encoding. Supports all Unicode characters across EN/ES/KO including Korean Hangul and Spanish diacritics.
- **Lead Logging**: JSONL append-only logs for access requests and enterprise inquiries. Includes timestamps, qualification scores, and IP addresses.
- **Static Assets**: Bootstrap 5.3.8, Font Awesome 6.5.1, Google Fonts (Ubuntu, Inter). All mockups and animations are pure CSS/JS — no image dependencies beyond brand logos.

- **Enterprise Inquiries**: [ruzaani.com/pricing](https://ruzaani.com/pricing/)
- **Admin Portal**: [admin.ruzaani.com](https://admin.ruzaani.com/)
